Constraint Types Explained\n292\t\n293\tCargo uses several version requirement syntaxes:\n294\t\n295\t| Syntax | Meaning | Example |\n296\t|--------|---------|---------|\n297\t| `\"1\"` | Any 1.x version (caret requirement) | `serde = \"1\"` accepts 1.0.0 through 1.x.x |\n298\t| `\"0.3\"` | Any 0.3.x version (caret requirement for 0.x) | `futures = \"0.3\"` accepts 0.3.0 through 0.3.x |\n299\t| `\"0.3.0\"` | Exact match (rarely used) | Pinning to exact patch version |\n300\t\n301\t**Default Behavior:** Cargo uses caret requirements (`^`) by default:\n302\t- `^1` → `>=1.0.0, <2.0.0`\n303\t- `^0.3` → `>=0.3.0, <0.4.0`\n304\t\n305\t**NEEDLE Practice:** Most dependencies use the default caret requirement through simple version strings like `\"1\"`, `\"0.3\"`, etc.\n306\t\n307\t---\n308\t\n309\t## Rust Compiler Version\n310\t\n311\t| Component | Minimum Version | Source |\n312\t|-----------|----------------|--------|\n313\t| **Rust Edition** | 2021 | Cargo.toml line 4 |\n314\t| **Rust Version** | 1.75 | Cargo.toml line 5 |\n315\t| **MSRV (Minimum Supported Rust Version)** | 1.75 | `rust-version = \"1.75\"` |\n316\t\n317\t**Constraints:**\n318\t- NEEDLE requires Rust 1.75 or higher\n319\t- Uses Rust 2021 edition\n320\t- All dependencies must be compatible with Rust 1.75+\n321\t\n322\t**Verification:**\n323\t```bash\n324\trustc --version  # Should show >= 1.75\n325\t```\n326\t\n327\t---\n328\t\n329\t## Feature Dependencies\n330\t\n331\tNEEDLE uses Cargo features to conditionally compile dependencies:\n332\t\n333\t| Feature | Dependencies Enabled | Default |\n334\t|--------|---------------------|---------|\n335\t| **otlp** | opentelemetry, opentelemetry_sdk, opentelemetry-otlp, opentelemetry-semantic-conventions, tonic, tracing-opentelemetry | ✅ Yes |\n336\t| **integration** | otlp + testcontainers | ❌ No |\n337\t\n338\t**Default Feature:** `otlp` is enabled by default (line 26: `default = [\"otlp\"]`)\n339\t\n340\t---\n341\t\n342\t## Dependency Resolution Order\n343\t\n344\tCargo resolves dependencies in this order:\n345\t\n346\t1. **Read Cargo.toml** → Get minimum version constraints for each dependency\n347\t2. **Query registry** → Find latest versions satisfying all constraints\n348\t3. **Check Cargo.lock** → Use locked versions if present (reproducible builds)\n349\t4. **Resolve conflicts** → Find compatible version set for all dependencies\n350\t5. **Write Cargo.lock** → Lock exact versions for reproducibility\n351\t\n352\t**NEEDLE Status:** Cargo.lock is committed → **reproducible builds guaranteed**\n353\t\n354\t---\n355\t\n356\t## Compatibility Constraints\n357\t\n358\t### Cross-Dependency Compatibility\n359\t\n360\tSome dependencies must use compatible |\n|--------|---------|---------|\n| `\"1\"` | Any 1.x version (caret requirement) | `serde = \"1\"` accepts 1.0.0 through 1.x.x |\n| `\"0.3\"` | Any 0.3.x version (caret requirement for 0.x) | `futures = \"0.3\"` accepts 0.3.0 through 0.3.x |\n| `\"0.3.0\"` | Exact match (rarely used) | Pinning to exact patch version |\n\n**Default Behavior:** Cargo uses caret requirements (`^`) by default:\n- `^1` → `>=1.0.0, <2.0.0`\n- `^0.3` → `>=0.3.0, <0.4.0`\n\n**NEEDLE Practice:** Most dependencies use the default caret requirement through simple version strings like `\"1\"`, `\"0.3\"`, etc.\n\n---\n\n## Rust Compiler Version\n\n| Component | Minimum Version | Source |\n|-----------|----------------|--------|\n| **Rust Edition** | 2021 | Cargo.toml line 4 |\n| **Rust Version** | 1.75 | Cargo.toml line 5 |\n| **MSRV (Minimum Supported Rust Version)** | 1.75 | `rust-version = \"1.75\"` |\n\n**Constraints:**\n- NEEDLE requires Rust 1.75 or higher\n- Uses Rust 2021 edition\n- All dependencies must be compatible with Rust 1.75+\n\n**Verification:**\n```bash\nrustc --version  # Should show >= 1.75\n```\n\n---\n\n## Feature Dependencies\n\nNEEDLE uses Cargo features to [\"otlp\"]`)\n\n---\n\n## Dependency Resolution Order\n\nCargo resolves dependencies in this order:\n\n1. **Read Cargo.toml** → Get minimum version constraints for each dependency\n2. **Query registry** → Find latest versions satisfying all constraints\n3. **Check Cargo.lock** → Use locked versions if present (reproducible builds)\n4. **Resolve conflicts** → Find compatible version set for all dependencies\n5. **Write Cargo.lock** → Lock exact versions for reproducibility\n\n**NEEDLE Status:** Cargo.lock is committed → **reproducible builds guaranteed**\n\n---\n\n## Compatibility Update `go.mod` version line\n222\t2. Update `Dockerfile` base image tag\n223\t3. Update `.golangci.yml` go version\n224\t4. Run `go mod tidy` to update dependencies\n225\t5. /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list\napt-get update && apt-get install -y gh\n```\n\n### BEAD CLI (br)\n\n**Required for NEEDLE operation:**\n- The `br` CLI (beads_rust) manages bead stores\n- ARMOR-Specific Dependencies\n\nIn addition to the core Pluck/NEEDLE requirements, ARMOR requires:\n\n**AWS SDK for Go v2:**\n- `github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2` - AWS service integration\n- primitives\n\n**Concurrency:**\n- `golang.org/x/sync` - Advanced synchronization primitives\n\n### ARMOR-Pluck Integration Points\n\nARMOR interacts with Pluck through:\n\n1. **Bead Store Access:** `logs/pluck-debug.log`\n4. **Workspace Management:** ARMOR workspace tracked in NEEDLE bead system\n\n### ARMOR Development Environment\n\n**Build Requirements:**\n```bash\n# Build ARMOR\ngo build |\n|------|-----------|---------|---------|\n| **Update Go dependencies** | Monthly | `go get -u ./... && go mod tidy` | Keep Go deps current |\n| **Update Rust dependencies** | Monthly | `cd /home/coding/NEEDLE && cargo update` | Keep Rust deps current |\n| **Update system packages** | Weekly | System package manager | Security patches |\n| **Update Docker base image** | Monthly | `docker pull golang:1.25-alpine` | Base image updates |\n| **Verify environment** | Weekly | Run verification commands | Ensure system stability |\n\n### Version Update Process\n\n**When updating Go or major dependencies:**\n\n1. **Update go.mod**\n   ```bash\n   cd /home/coding/ARMOR\n   go get -u ./...\n   go mod tidy\n   ```\n\n2. **Test thoroughly**\n   ```bash\n   go build ./...\n   go test ./... -short\n   go vet ./...\n   ```\n\n3. **Update go.sum with new checksums**\n   ```bash\n   go mod verify\n   ```\n\n4. **Commit changes**\n   ```bash\n   git add go.mod go.sum\n   git commit -m \"deps: update Go dependencies\"\n   ```\n\n5. **Update this document** with new versions\n\n**When updating Rust/NEEDLE dependencies:**\n\n1. **Update Cargo.lock**\n   ```bash\n   cd /home/coding/NEEDLE\n   cargo update\n   ```\n\n2. **Build and test**\n   ```bash\n   cargo build --release\n   cargo test\n   cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings\n   ```\n\n3. **Reinstall NEEDLE**\n   ```bash\n   cargo install --path .\n   ```\n\n4. **Update this document** with new versions\n\n### Update Checklist\n\nBefore updating any dependency, ensure:\n\n- [ ] Current version is documented in this file\n- [ ] Release notes for new version have been reviewed\n- [ ] Breaking changes are identified\n- [ ] Tests pass with new version\n- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced\n- [ ] This document is updated after successful update\n\n---\n\n## Related Documentation\n\n### ARMOR Project Documentation\n\n- **README:** `/home/coding/ARMOR/README.md` - Project |\n|------|-----------|---------|---------|\n| **Update Go dependencies** | Monthly | `go get -u ./... && go mod tidy` | Keep Go deps current |\n| **Update Rust dependencies** | Monthly | `cd /home/coding/NEEDLE && cargo update` | Keep Rust deps current |\n| **Update system packages** | Weekly | System package manager | Security patches |\n| **Update Docker base image** | Monthly | `docker pull golang:1.25-alpine` | Base image updates |\n| **Verify environment** | Weekly | Run verification commands | Ensure system stability |\n\n### Version Update Process\n\n**When updating Go or major dependencies:**\n\n1. **Update go.mod**\n   ```bash\n   cd /home/coding/ARMOR\n   go get -u ./...\n   go mod tidy\n   ```\n\n2. **Test thoroughly**\n   ```bash\n   go build ./...\n   go test ./... -short\n   go vet ./...\n   ```\n\n3. **Update go.sum with new checksums**\n   ```bash\n   go mod verify\n   ```\n\n4. **Commit changes**\n   ```bash\n   git add go.mod go.sum\n   git commit -m \"deps: update Go dependencies\"\n   ```\n\n5. **Update this document** with new versions\n\n**When updating Rust/NEEDLE dependencies:**\n\n1. **Update Cargo.lock**\n   ```bash\n   cd /home/coding/NEEDLE\n   cargo update\n   ```\n\n2. **Build and test**\n   ```bash\n   cargo build --release\n   cargo test\n   cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings\n   ```\n\n3. **Reinstall NEEDLE**\n   ```bash\n   cargo install --path .\n   ```\n\n4. **Update this document** with new versions\n\n### Update Checklist\n\nBefore updating any dependency, ensure:\n\n- [ ] Current version is documented in this file\n- [ ] Release notes for new version have been reviewed\n- [ ] Breaking changes are identified\n- [ ] Tests pass with new version\n- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced\n- [ ] This document is updated after successful update\n\n---\n\n## Related Documentation\n\n### ARMOR Project Documentation\n\n- **README:** `/home/coding/ARMOR/README.md` - Project
